dependencies.notification: API contract v{version} available for frontend consumption. Endpoints: {endpoint_count}, Schemas: {schema_count}
dependencies.description: Frontend implementation cannot begin without finalized API contract from backend tech design phase

dependencies.notification: API contract available. QA can now design API validation tests and contract-driven scenarios
dependencies.description: QA informed early to begin planning API-level test scenarios

dependencies.artifact: Backend implementation code merged to main
dependencies.notification: Backend code ready for test design. Feature scope: {features}. Code coverage: {coverage}%
dependencies.description: QA notified that backend implementation is complete and ready for test design phase

dependencies.artifact: Frontend implementation code merged to main
dependencies.notification: Frontend code ready for integration testing. Components: {component_count}. Integration points: {integration_count}
dependencies.description: QA notified that frontend implementation is complete and integration testing can begin

dependencies.artifact: Test case specifications and test data
dependencies.notification: Test cases ready (count: {test_count}). Performance team can derive load and stress test scenarios
dependencies.description: Performance team informed that QA test design is complete and functional test cases can inform performance testing strategy

dependencies.artifact: SIT results report with pass/fail status
dependencies.notification: SIT passed with {pass_count}/{total_count} tests. No critical defects. Ready for pre-production deployment
dependencies.description: Pre-production deployment is blocked until SIT testing is complete and passes

dependencies.notification: Performance baseline established. Throughput: {throughput} req/s, Latency p99: {latency_p99}ms, CPU: {cpu_usage}%, Memory: {mem_usage}%
dependencies.description: Release manager informed that performance baseline has been established for comparison against production targets

dependencies.artifact: Backend implementation and integration test suite
dependencies.notification: Backend implementation complete. Integration test suite available: {test_count} tests. Ready for frontend integration testing
dependencies.description: Frontend team can now perform integration testing against actual backend implementation

notes: All timestamps are in ISO 8601 format with Z for UTC
Blocking dependencies can be overridden with explicit user acknowledgment
Informational dependencies are non-blocking and for context only
Artifact locations are relative to repository root
ETA calculations based on team velocity metrics in .sdlc/team-metrics.json
Timeout hours of 0 means no time-based gate, only completion-based
